overall.description: A cinematic static shot of a grand gothic great hall reminiscent of Hogwarts, featuring floating candles, stained glass windows, and long dining tables with students seated. Two students in dark robes walk across the foreground at different times. High-quality game engine footage with dramatic lighting.

segments.scene_description: A static cinematic view of a grand gothic great hall illuminated by floating candles and natural light from stained glass windows. Students are seated at long wooden tables throughout the space. Two students walk across the foreground from left to right at different moments, temporarily obscuring the view of the floor.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot presents a static, cinematic view of a grand gothic great hall that maintains a steady, atmospheric presence throughout the scene. It begins with a wide perspective of the hall, where floating candles and natural light from stained glass windows illuminate students seated at long wooden tables. As the scene unfolds, the stillness is punctuated by the movement of two students in dark robes who walk across the foreground from left to right. These figures temporarily obscure the view of the floor before passing through the frame, leaving the majestic architecture and dramatic lighting to dominate the view once more.
